name: hr-payroll
description: HR and payroll operations. Bundles Paylocity (roster snapshots, new-hire flow, pay-rate and deduction/tax audits) plus core HR skills: compensation benchmarking, recruiting pipeline, interview prep, org planning, people analytics, and employee handbook authoring.

paylocity_client_id.title: Paylocity client ID
paylocity_client_id.description: Paylocity OAuth2 client ID. Leave blank to disable Paylocity.

paylocity_company_id.title: Paylocity company ID
paylocity_company_id.description: Paylocity company ID that scopes all calls.

paylocity_base_url.title: Paylocity base URL
paylocity_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the default (https://api.paylocity.com).

paylocity_sandbox.title: Paylocity sandbox
paylocity_sandbox.description: Optional. Enable to target the Paylocity sandbox (ignored if a base URL is set).
